hero.title: Himalayan Sound Bowl Sessions
hero.subtitle: Sound bowl sessions bring us into a pleasant mood and provide meditative relaxation.

howItWorks.title: The sound bowl and its effects
howItWorks.paragraph1: The different frequencies and tones of the sound bowls have a harmonious and purifying effect on our body, down to the cellular level. Because the human body consists of approximately 70% water, the frequencies of the different tones cause changes in our energy. Blockages disappear and energy flows more freely.
howItWorks.paragraph2: During the sound bowl session, I focus on the energy system of our body that is influenced by the 7 chakras, the central nervous system, and breathing. The goal of these sessions is stress reduction, letting go of thoughts, and support in healing processes.

stress.title: Stress Reduction
stress.description: Deep relaxation through vibrations that calm the nervous system

energy.title: Energy Balance
energy.description: Restoring blockages and free energy flow through the chakras

healing.title: Healing Support
healing.description: Support for physical and mental healing processes

about.title: Who is Clayret?
about.paragraph1: I was born and raised in Colombia. Part of my life path I walked in Aruba, and for years I have been living and moving in the energy flow of Amsterdam.
about.paragraph2: Through my admiration for Universal Energies and the intelligence of our biological body, I traveled to the Himalayan region of Nepal/Ladakh North India, where I learned to play sound bowls professionally.
about.paragraph3: I complement the sessions by using many magical musical instruments, allowing you to experience a special inner journey.

sessions.title: Discover our sessions
sessions.subtitle: Each session is a unique journey to inner peace and balance

group.title: Group Session
group.description: Share the power of sound with others in an intimate group session. Maximum 5 people for a personal experience.

private.title: Private Session
private.description: A fully personalized 1-on-1 session for deep personal relaxation and healing.

fullMoon.title: Full Moon Ceremony
fullMoon.description: A magical ceremony under the energy of the full moon. A special experience of connection and letting go.

cacao.title: Cacao Ceremony
cacao.description: Combine the power of ceremonial cacao with sound bowls for a heart-opening experience.

massage.title: Holistic Massage
massage.description: A deep, holistic massage. Also available as pregnancy or mama massage.

drumCircle.title: Drum Circle Cacao Ceremony
drumCircle.description: A powerful combination of drumming and cacao for a transformative group experience.

sessions.notice: Please note: sound bowl sessions are less suitable for pregnancy, heart problems, a pacemaker, high blood pressure, thrombosis, or varicose veins.
sessions.cancellation: Cannot make it? Please let us know at least 24 hours in advance, otherwise we will unfortunately have to charge for the reserved time.

items.name: Jeantine & Mark
items.quote: Clayrety is the most fantastic hostess ever... When you walk in, it's already one big warm bath... And then the sound bowl bath. It's everything you didn't know you needed.

items.name: Margarita Jimenez
items.quote: Clayret took me on a journey with all her love, care, and genuine attention. I've been to Tibet, India, and the South American jungle!

items.name: Linda
items.quote: An evening at Clayret's is magical... Every session is different, but I always leave completely relaxed.

items.name: Yael
items.quote: Clayret, sound bowls, a garden house, tea, soup, and lots of love. A piece of paradise on earth.

items.name: Sema
items.quote: Your sound bowl sessions always give me a sense of peace... you prepare the space in the most beautiful way.

items.name: Sabien
items.quote: Clayret is a master at creating a loving environment... With her sound bowls, she takes me to a state of deep rest.

items.name: Lynne
items.quote: For me, the perfect combination of spiritual and down to earth... You can tell Clayret has experience.

items.name: Yana
items.quote: The sound bowl session at Clayret's was super nice... Clay is super loving, very open, spiritual and at the same time also nicely down to earth.
